description: Validates p-for loops, checking type inference and ensuring a warning is generated for loops missing a p-key.

diagnostics.messageContains: Elements with 'p-for' directives should have a unique 'p-key' binding for efficient updates

assertNodes.description: The first list item with a p-key should resolve its internal variable types correctly.
The second list item WITHOUT a p-key should still resolve its variables, despite triggering a warning.
